nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Campo flicker
nodes.summary: Campo flicker（Campo flicker，学名 Colaptes campestris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats to either have been identified. The species is "considered common throughout its range." "Although Campo Flicker populations may benefit by the increasing amount of open habitats due to human interventions, alternatively, the species may suffer from the decrease of available nesting sites due to deforestation."
